triage_rows.key_reason: External audit is good enough to keep alive, but chronology is still too weak for hard-candidate status.
The branch is directionally right on the broad pool, but not stable enough to justify promotion or replay-facing expansion.
The line deserves another non-replay audit cycle because the external pool is positive, but min time-split performance at 0.375 blocks anything stronger.

interpretation: V1.18W is the scheduled three-run adversarial triage for the sustained-participation non-chase branch.
All three reviewers converged on the same middle answer: this line is alive, but only as candidate-only.
The next budget should go to non-replay hardening of false-positive control and temporal robustness, not replay-facing expansion.
